settings.heading: Clarity is a luxury.
settings.subheading:
You don't have to crash to change.
You just have to choose better.

settings.quote_body_1:
I lived in environments where excess was normal.
Where success and escape looked the same.
settings.quote_body_2:
Clarity became the edge.
Discipline became the advantage.
settings.quote_highlight_2:
This isn't about restriction.
It's about control.

settings.heading:
THIS IS BIGGER
THAN PRODUCT.
settings.body:
Modern Søber is a shift.
People choosing clarity, discipline,
and control — together.
We don't do this alone.
settings.cta_note: Private Facebook group. Real people. Real stories. No judgment.

settings.heading:
Clarity is available.
Most people just don't choose it.
